title: Admin - Approve Vendor Application - Functional Test Plan
author: QA Automation
overview: Functional testing of the Admin Approve Vendor Application feature on the AT/AD Admin Portal. Covers Approve button visibility (only for Pending vendors), approval workflow (status change to Active, timestamp recording), and keyboard accessibility of the Approve button.

inScope: Approve button visibility only on Pending vendor cards/details
Approve button not visible for Active, Inactive, or Rejected vendors
Approval action — vendor status changes to Active
outOfScope: Vendor notification delivery mechanism (backend email service)
Vendor product upload flow (separate story, only verify access is granted)
Vendor list and tab functionality (covered by SCRUM-469)
Vendor moves to Active Partners tab (requires vendor portal access)
Pending/Active tab count verification (requires vendor portal access)
Vendor receives approval notification (requires email/notification verification)
Concurrent approval by another admin (requires concurrent sessions)
Vendor product upload access verification (requires vendor portal access)
Screen reader accessible label verification (requires assistive technology)

relatedStories: SCRUM-469 - View Vendor Lists by Status (tab movement after approval)
SCRUM-475 - View Vendor Details (Approve button context)

prerequisites: Admin is signed in to the Admin Portal
At least two vendors in Pending Approval status
Active, Inactive, and Rejected vendors exist for negative testing

testCases.title: Verify Approve button is visible for Pending vendors
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Approve button visible only for Pending vendors
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Pending Approval tab with pending vendors
steps: Navigate to the vendor list page
Click the Pending Approval tab
Locate a pending vendor card or open View Details
Verify an Approve button is visible
expectedResults: Approve button is visible and clearly labeled
testCases.postconditions: Approve button is accessible for pending vendors

testCases.title: Verify Approve button is NOT visible for Active vendors
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Approve button visible only for Pending vendors
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Active Partners tab
steps: Click the Active Partners tab
Locate an active vendor card or open View Details
Verify no Approve button is present
testCases.postconditions: Approve button is hidden for active vendors

testCases.title: Verify Approve button is NOT visible for Inactive vendors
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Approve button visible only for Pending vendors
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Inactive Partners tab
steps: Click the Inactive Partners tab
Locate an inactive vendor card or open View Details
Verify no Approve button is present
testCases.postconditions: Approve button is hidden for inactive vendors

testCases.title: Verify Approve button is NOT visible for Rejected vendors
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Approve button visible only for Pending vendors
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Rejected Partners tab
steps: Click the Rejected Partners tab
Locate a rejected vendor card or open View Details
Verify no Approve button is present
testCases.postconditions: Approve button is hidden for rejected vendors

testCases.title: Verify vendor status changes to Active on approval
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC2 - On approval, vendor status changes to Active
testCases.preconditions: Admin is viewing a pending vendor
steps: Navigate to the Pending Approval tab
Note a specific pending vendor name
Click the Approve button for that vendor
Confirm the approval (if confirmation dialog appears)
Verify the vendor status changes to Active
testCases.postconditions: Vendor is approved and status is Active

testCases.title: Verify approval timestamp is recorded
testCases.preconditions: A vendor has just been approved
steps: Approve a pending vendor
Open View Details for the now-active vendor
Locate the approval timestamp or approval date field
Verify the timestamp matches the current date/time of approval
expectedResults: Timestamp matches the approximate time of approval
testCases.postconditions: Approval timestamp is recorded and visible

testCases.title: Verify Approve button is accessible via keyboard
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Pending Approval tab
steps: Use Tab key to navigate to the Approve button on a pending vendor
Verify the button receives focus with a visible indicator
Press Enter or Space to activate the Approve button
Verify the approval action is triggered
expectedResults: Approve button is reachable via Tab
Focus indicator is visible on the button

vendorAccounts: At least 2 vendors in Pending Approval status
At least 1 vendor in Active status (for negative button visibility test)
At least 1 vendor in Inactive status (for negative button visibility test)
At least 1 vendor in Rejected status (for negative button visibility test)

assumptions: Admin Portal is accessible and admin sign-in works (SCRUM-442)
Vendor list with status tabs is available (SCRUM-469)
Approve button is accessible from vendor card or View Details modal (or both)
Approval timestamp format and location in UI are not specified
risks: Approval timestamp format and location in UI are not specified
Whether a confirmation dialog exists before approval is not specified in the story
openQuestions: Is there a confirmation dialog before the approval action is executed?
Where is the Approve button located — on the vendor card, in the View Details modal, or both?
Where is the approval timestamp displayed — in View Details, in the vendor card, or in an audit log?
Is there an undo/revert option after approval?
Note: 'Double-click approval → idempotent action' was removed from edge cases on 2026-02-10. Confirm double-click behavior is still handled (e.g., button disabled after first click).
notesFromChangelog: Description updated 2026-02-10: 'Double-click approval → idempotent action' edge case was removed. Current edge cases: concurrent approval by another admin, and system error rollback.
